description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Configure a customizable corporate lunch package for 25 guests that stays at or below $25 per person and includes at least three vegetarian dishes, then add it to your cart and open the cart page.
tasks.name: Configure a customizable corporate lunch package for 25 guests that stays at or below $25 per person and includes at least three vegetarian dishes, then add it to your cart and open the cart page.

tasks.instruction: In the weddings section, choose a mid-priced 3-course plated dinner package for 120 guests (neither the cheapest nor the most expensive), add a per-person bar service add-on, select any future wedding date, and submit the quote request with contact details.

tasks.instruction: Compare two birthday or party packages that both include dessert and can serve 40 guests, then add only the cheaper one for 40 guests to your cart.
tasks.name: Compare two birthday or party packages that both include dessert and can serve 40 guests, then add only the cheaper one for 40 guests to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Use the custom menu builder to create a dinner menu with two appetizers, two main courses, and one dessert that keeps the price at or below $55 per person for between 20 and 30 guests, then proceed to the menu summary or cart.

tasks.instruction: Using the booking calendar, find and select the earliest available Saturday evening time slot in July 2025 for 80 guests and continue through the event details form to the booking summary page without making a payment.

tasks.instruction: Choose any catering package that can serve 60 guests with a base price of at most $50 per person, add exactly two paid add-ons, go to checkout, apply an active 15% off promo code, and reach an order summary where the discounted total for 60 guests is under $2,600.

tasks.instruction: From the full menu, add two savory gluten-free items and one gluten-free dessert, each rated at least 4 stars, to a tasting or favorites list, then open that list to review the three selected items.

tasks.instruction: Set up morning coffee break catering for 50 guests on three consecutive available days in May 2025 by adding a suitable coffee break package for each date as separate line items, then open the cart summary to review them.
